scripts.dev: bun scripts/prune-build.mjs && bun scripts/free-ports.mjs 5173 && bun scripts/kill-stale-dev.mjs && bun scripts/ensure-ui-dist.mjs && NOMI_CHANNEL=dev tauri dev --config apps/desktop/tauri.conf.json --config apps/desktop/tauri.dev.conf.json
scripts.dev:web: bun scripts/prune-build.mjs && bun scripts/free-ports.mjs 5173 8787 && concurrently -k -n api,ui -c blue,magenta "cargo run -p nomifun-web -- --port 8787 --dist ui/dist --insecure-no-auth" "bun run --filter=./ui dev:web"
scripts.build: CI=true tauri build --config apps/desktop/tauri.conf.json && bun scripts/prune-build.mjs --post
scripts.build:updater: CI=true tauri build --config apps/desktop/tauri.conf.json --config '{"bundle":{"createUpdaterArtifacts":true}}' && bun scripts/prune-build.mjs --post
scripts.serve:web: bun scripts/prune-build.mjs && bun scripts/free-ports.mjs 8787 && cargo run -p nomifun-web
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run check:i18n && bun run check:theme && bun run help --check
